approach: Lagrangian Newton-Raphson Gibbs free energy minimization with cubic EOS, benchmarked across 5 chemical systems (combustion, sulfur, ammonia synthesis, CO2 acid gas, H2/O2, multi-component) and 5 algorithmic variants (baseline fixed-damping vs. Armijo backtracking + Tikhonov regularization). Five repeated timing trials per case.
conclusions: All 25 benchmark cases reached convergence with mass-balance tolerance satisfied. Per-variant aggregates are reported in key_results.
